title: ConvertKit vs Klaviyo (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ConvertKit vs Klaviyo: pricing, features, and performance. Find the best email marketing platform for your needs.
h1: ConvertKit vs Klaviyo: Detailed Comparison for 2025
intro: ConvertKit and Klaviyo are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and use cases. ConvertKit is purpose-built for creators and course sellers, while Klaviyo specializes in e-commerce marketing automation. Choosing between them depends on your business model, budget, and specific feature requirements.

comparison_table.tool_a: Landing pages, visual automations, commerce features

choose_a_if: You're a content creator, blogger, or online course seller looking for creator-focused tools
You want to earn affiliate commissions by recommending the platform
You need built-in landing pages and want to minimize costs with a lower starting price
choose_b_if: You run an e-commerce business on Shopify or WooCommerce and need advanced integrations
You want SMS marketing capabilities alongside email automation
You value predictive analytics and advanced segmentation for customer insights

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your use case. ConvertKit excels for creators and course sellers with its landing pages and affordable pricing, while Klaviyo dominates for e-commerce businesses with superior integrations and predictive analytics. ConvertKit scores higher on Trustpilot (3.2 vs 3.8), though both are well-regarded.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ConvertKit or Klaviyo?
faq.a: ConvertKit is more affordable overall, starting at $29/month compared to Klaviyo's $45/month. ConvertKit also offers a more generous free tier (1,000 subscribers vs 500), making it better for bootstrapped creators. However, Klaviyo's pricing may offer better value if you need e-commerce-specific features.

faq.q: Can I switch from Klaviyo to ConvertKit?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support email list exports, making migration possible. However, you may lose some platform-specific features like Klaviyo's SMS flows or advanced segmentation. ConvertKit offers tools for importing subscribers, though complex automation sequences may require manual recreation.
